posts.content: Huge turnouts expected for political rallies in Sheikhpura assembly constituency. Development issues are taking center stage! #Sheikhpura #BiharElections2025
How is the candidate ground outreach in Sheikhpura? Hearing that the MGNREGA work distribution and local water issues will decide the swing voters here.
Public Opinion in Sheikhpura: Ground survey of what rural voters want from the next MLA.
